scope_refinement:
TrueScan was originally scoped as a multimodal (visual + audio) deepfake
detection system. During Phase 3 the active project team changed from
three members to two. To preserve implementation depth, reproducibility,
and evaluation rigor for the remaining two members, we refined the scope
to image-level visual deepfake detection only. Audio detection (ASVspoof,
WaveFake, AASIST, LFCC features) and video-level temporal aggregation
are deferred to future work.
future_work: multimodal fusion of audio and visual signals

baseline.name: EfficientNet-B0 (timm)
baseline.rationale: Lowest-cost backbone with strong transfer learning; lets us verify the data pipeline within ~30 min on Colab GPU.

main_xception.name: Xception (timm legacy_xception with embedded PyTorch fallback)
main_xception.rationale: Original Roessler et al. (2019) FF++ baseline; depthwise separable convolutions are well-suited to capture deepfake spatial artifacts.

head_to_head_b3.name: EfficientNet-B3 (timm)
head_to_head_b3.role: modern compound-scaled CNN compared head-to-head with Xception
head_to_head_b3.rationale: Provides a stronger comparison than Xception alone and lets us pick whichever wins on FF++ val for downstream analysis.

aux_frequency_branch.name: FreqAux MLP (concatenated with backbone logit)
aux_frequency_branch.rationale: Section 7b motivates an explicit DCT input; the small MLP fuses backbone logits with frequency-domain features, a novel addition vs the standard FF++ baseline.

training_enhancements: Focal Loss + class-weighted BCE blend, label smoothing 0.05
top-K=3 checkpoint snapshots for snapshot ensembling
auto-resume from latest checkpoint on Colab disconnect
inference_enhancements: Test-Time Augmentation (TTA): hflip + multi-crop, mean of 4 logits
Snapshot ensemble of top-3 checkpoints for the primary model
primary_model_selection: better of (Xception, EfficientNet-B3) on FF++ val AUROC; recorded in outputs/reports/primary_model_selection.txt
